summary:
THE AMERICAN ECLIPSE AND PROPHETIC WARNINGS: Brandon reflects on the American solar eclipse of April 8th, noting that while many prophetic voices predicted immediate events, he correctly stated nothing would happen on that specific day. As the one-year anniversary of the eclipse approaches, he emphasizes that the event was a sign of a coming great shaking to awaken America rather than an immediate catastrophe. He also mentions visiting a temple where he believes the Antichrist will eventually be worshipped and points to an upcoming astronomical sign on April 25th featuring two stars and a moon. He states that a supernatural timeframe is unfolding between Passovers, indicating major shifts ahead. Furthermore, Brandon asserts that Donald Trump, despite being prayed for, is unwittingly being used to establish a digital platform that will usher in the end-time beast system.

VISION OF CHICKENS AND EAGLES: Brandon describes a vision contrasting two types of prophetic voices within the church. He saw prophetic figures with human faces on the bodies of chickens, pecking at the dirt in a barren pen, representing those who are earthbound, seeking familiarity, and failing to bring true change. In contrast, he observed eagles flying increasingly higher into the sky until they merged with the blinding light of the sun. He states that God instructed him to be like the eagle, losing himself in the divine presence so that people only see God. Brandon urges believers to elevate their spiritual perspective and avoid the distractions of lower-level, familiar voices that produce no spiritual fruit.

SCRIPTURAL WARNINGS AGAINST FALSE PROPHETS: Brandon quotes extensively from Jeremiah 23 to underscore his warning against false prophets who invent dreams, steal messages from one another, and offer futile hopes of peace. He highlights the scripture's condemnation of smooth-tongued leaders who lead people astray with imaginary prophecies. Linking this to modern events, Brandon cautions against blindly trusting newly converted celebrities who promote a universal gospel, as well as deceptive individuals within the church. He references Billy Brim's analogy of sharks and dolphins to remind believers that while some may look harmless from a distance, spiritual discernment is required to identify those with dangerous intentions.

ECONOMIC SHAKING AND DOMESTIC THREATS: Brandon warns of a severe economic downturn orchestrated by figures like BlackRock, Jeff Bezos, Bill Gates, and George Soros, who he claims are attempting to intentionally sink the economy to politically embarrass Trump. He predicts massive credit card debt crises, defaults on car and home loans, and trouble for used car retailers like CarMax. His visions include a digital dollar replacing the current currency after a period where money is seized from banks, leading to a debt jubilee. Brandon also details upcoming trade wars between America and China that will result in empty grocery shelves, food lines, and critical shortages of medical supplies.

GEOPOLITICAL CONFLICTS AND ALLIANCES: Brandon shares visions of escalating global conflicts, beginning with a massive explosion on the border of North and South Korea. He describes China rising like a fiery red dragon out of a volcano to back North Korea, alongside a strengthening alliance between Russia, China, North Korea, and Iran under the BRICS coalition. He notes that secret meetings and promises are emboldening outcast nations, including Cuba and Venezuela, leading to the potential establishment of a hostile military base in Cuba. Additionally, he sees Russia attempting to reclaim former Soviet territories like Ukraine and Poland to rebuild a powerful Soviet Union, while China targets Taiwan and South Korea for communist expansion.

TRIBULATION EVENTS AND NATURAL DISASTERS: Brandon outlines catastrophic events tied to the Tribulation period, viewing the rapid riding of the Red Horse of war followed by the black and green horses of famine and pestilence. He describes a desolate, coast-to-coast war in America that wipes out Hawaii, accompanied by massive volcanic eruptions. He foresees a world-altering volcano erupting in Asia, likely Japan, with lava destroying everything in its path like Pompeii. He also mentions hearing rumblings and warnings concerning Yosemite National Park in California. He describes a demonic, scorpion-like influence connecting Ireland, Canada, King Charles of England, and Australia, signifying global spiritual darkness and turmoil.

MILLENNIAL REIGN AND NEW EARTH: Brandon details a vivid glimpse past the Tribulation into the Millennial Reign, witnessing the instant creation of a New Heaven and a New Earth. He describes a massive, galaxy-sized portal opening in the atmosphere, instantly transforming the world into a pristine environment resembling the Garden of Eden. The new earth features vibrant, thick green grass, colorful skies of pink and yellow, and an absolute absence of death, decay, or pollution. He explains that the Bride of Christ will not endure the wrath of the Tribulation but will be removed beforehand, eventually dwelling in this perfect, perpetually living world where the atmosphere itself feels alive.
rawData: [April 07, 2025]-[Words can’t describe what happened today in prayer – the Glory]-[https://youtu.be/OvEIqBmJLjo]-[Hey, good morning family. Praise the Lord. Thank you for joining us today. I told the Lord, "What direction do you want me to go on this one?" because I have some things on my heart that He's been talking to me about. You know, I do so many videos, y'all. So I said, "I'm just going to be real about things that are going on in my life, what I'm praying over, and what He's showing me." Some things I just kind of keep to myself, but I thought this was kind of cool what He was talking to me about. He said, "I want you to go back and look at when the eclipse took place." Many people, He said, dropped it; they didn't think it was very serious. There were a lot of prophetic words that went forth about the solar eclipse. The American eclipse is the one I'm referring to—the American eclipse that took place on April 8th. It was a major thing, and many prophetic voices were speaking about it, and they all thought something was going to happen on April 8th of last year. Many people did, and I told you all—people said, "Brandon, what did you feel about it?" I told everybody, if you go back and look at my videos, I was very blunt about it: nothing is going to happen on April 8th. That's what the Lord said to me. I thought, "Man, I know I've heard the Lord that nothing is going to happen on April 8th." Well, we went to the temple. I showed you all and I filmed, and I told you all this is where they're going to have the meetings on Friday and all the things. I stood out there, Braden filmed it, and Diana was in the car. It was a really spooky feeling because it was at the place that I know people will worship the Antichrist in the days ahead. If you haven't watched my video about the Tribulation, you really should. It's one of my favorite visitations from the Lord, going out of my body and seeing the Tribulation in the future. So, the eclipse took place and it went right over, and everybody said it was a Jonah experience and Nineveh, all the things—it's coming in on Nineveh. There were so many prophetic words around it. I'm going somewhere with this: we're stepping into a full year since the eclipse on the 8th of April, which is next Tuesday. So we have the full year, and all those prophetic words—none of that stuff seemed to manifest. But I've warned you all. When you're looking into the spirit, you see a depth perception. There is a depth perception. So, a lot of people go, "Oh, that was a big nothing burger. Nothing happened off of the eclipse that came through Texas and went up the way it did, and the one that went through Oregon and all that, and it made a cross over Little Egypt and all that." Oh, the body of Christ is just so into it. You know the signs, no signs. Nothing happened. Watch. That's all I can tell you. Next Tuesday is the full year of that. Brandon, where are you going with this? I'm telling you all, I saw the economy and things changing with the economy again. And I'm telling you, the stiff-neckedness is upon the land. The Lord told me, "I'm bringing a humbling to America. There will be a great shaking to awaken." I told you about the window. I told you about these things. There'll be great shakeouts. I've said these words: great shakeouts. Great things will come, things that you all don't realize because you jump on the bandwagon of Prophet So-and-So, Prophet So-and-So—all these words, all the YouTube chatter. But again, I was in prayer and the Lord showed me a bunch of prophetic faces, and they were on the heads of chickens. They had big fluffy hinees on these chicken butts, and they were turned up to the sky, and they were pecking in the chicken yard. All the little chicks were the body of Christ. But you had a bunch of prophetic roosters, and they would look up and they would crow and they would say the word as they were in this pen. They were in this big old pen. It looked like a metal fence, but there was hardly any grass on the ground. They were just pecking on the ground, digging around, and scratching. But every once in a while, I saw the individual faces of each one of these prophetic people. The Lord showed me individuals—certain people—and I saw their faces on these rooster bodies. Their hinees were up, and their feathers were big, white, and fluffy. They were up in the air, but their heads were always down while their butts were up in the air as they were pecking on the ground. Every once in a while, they would look up and crow, and all the chickens around the barnyard would scatter around. They were listening, but the chickens were just stirred. Then I saw the eagles, and I saw the prophetic eagles that were flying. They were accelerating up and up and up. As they were going up, they were chirping over the land like a loud eagle cry. As they did, the chickens were listening. They were scurrying about because they were freaked out about the eagle up there high. They were going up higher. As they were looking at the eagle, they were only able to see the sun. As the eagle went into the sun, the eagle started to disappear. You could hear his voice still because the eagle and the sun were becoming one. As they went higher and higher out into the prophetic realm, they went to the sun. As the sun and the eagle were starting to become one—because as you tried to look to the eagle to see what was going on, all you could see was the sun—the sun became blinding and the eagle disappeared in it because nothing else mattered other than the sun. The chickens were still on the ground pecking away, but the eagle went higher and higher and higher. There was a difference between hearing the prophetic voice of the eagle versus the chicken who was only able to be right there in the barnyard, pecking away at the worms and working things up with his claws. He's trying to get the grubs out of the dirt, trying to feed and eat off of it. But the eagle was going higher, and he was looking at the sun so much so that he disappeared in the sun. It shook me. And the Lord said, "Be like the eagle. Be like the eagle. Lose yourself in me. And as people go to hear you, you are so close to me that they're not able to see you. They're able to see me through you." They lose themselves in the glory of the sun. It's not about you; it's about me. He said, "Come up higher. Come up higher to the throne of grace." That's what He's telling y'all. That's what He's telling me. Prophesy as an eagle that is going into the sun. You become blinding as you look at the sun. Don't be like the chicken scratching with his little claws, trying to get all the dirt up, having his butt up there with his head up, saying "cock-a-doodle-doo" while everybody's looking around. But it's not changing nothing. They're just scratching around like other chickens, but everybody's looking at the rooster because that's who they're familiar with. It's what's comfortable to you—to look at the rooster. But God's called you to be an eagle that flies high into the sun. Don't be down-scratching. I've talked about this a little bit before, but I've got more of it. I've got more, and He's showing me more. A lot of them are in cages. There are still cages all around them, but God's calling you up higher. God is calling you up higher. Soar into the sun and listen to the eagle. Listen to the eagles. You're going to know the difference between an eagle and a chicken, a rooster, real soon because there's fruit behind it. There's fruit behind it. It's going to change. You're going to go from glory to glory. He's changing you. These are the scriptures that He's giving me for this: Jeremiah 23. This is what the Lord of Heaven's Armies says to His people: 'Do not listen to these prophets when they prophesy to you, filling you with futile hopes, for they are making up everything they say. They do not speak for the Lord. They keep saying to those who despise My word, "Don't worry. The Lord says you will have peace." And to those who stubbornly follow their own desires, they say, "No harm will come your way." Have any of these prophets been in the Lord's presence to hear what He is really saying? Have even one of them cared enough to listen? Look, the Lord's anger burst out like a storm, a whirlwind that swirls down on the heads of the wicked. The anger of the Lord will not diminish until it has finished all He has planned. In the days to come, you will understand all this very clearly. I have not sent those prophets, yet they run around claiming to speak for Me. I have given them no message, yet they go on prophesying. If they had stood before Me and listened to Me, they would have spoken My words, and they would have turned My people away from their evil ways and deeds. Am I a God who is only close at hand?' says the Lord. 'No, I am far away at the same time. Can anyone hide from Me in a secret place? Am I not everywhere in all the heavens and the earth?' says the Lord. 'I have heard these prophets say, "Listen to the dream I had from God last night," and then they proceed to tell lies in My name. How long will this go on? If they are prophets, they are prophets of deceit, inventing everything they say. By telling these false dreams, they are trying to get My people to forget Me, just as their ancestors did by worshiping the idols of Baal. Let these false prophets tell their dreams, but let My true messengers faithfully proclaim My every word. There is a difference between straw and grain. Does not My word burn like fire?' says the Lord. 'Is it not like a mighty hammer that smashes a rock to pieces? Therefore,' says the Lord, 'I am against those prophets who steal messages from each other and claim they are from Me.' That happens a lot. Say that again. 'Therefore,' says the Lord, 'I am against these prophets who steal messages from each other and claim they are from Me. I am against those smooth-tongued prophets who say, "This prophecy is from the Lord." I am against these false prophets. Their imaginary dreams are flagrant lies that lead My people into sin. I did not send or appoint them, and they have no message at all for My people. I, the Lord, have spoken.' Suppose one of the people or one of the prophets or priests asks you, 'What prophecy has the Lord burdened you with?' Now, you must reply, 'You are the burden. The Lord says He will abandon you.' If any prophet, priest, or anyone else says, 'I have a prophecy from the Lord,' I will punish that person along with his entire family. You should keep asking each other, 'What is the Lord's answer?' or 'What is the Lord's saying?' But stop using the phrase 'prophecy from the Lord,' for people are using it to give authority to their own ideas, turning upside down the words of our God, the living God of Heaven's Armies. Okay, that's very strong. But there were so many different verses in this that just popped out to me that the Lord was saying about where we are right now, about the chickens. There are a lot of people that are giving things and telling you their dreams. They're telling you these things, but it's not coming from the Lord; it's coming from them. And I'm telling you, timing is everything. Let me go back to the eclipse. I'm telling y'all, we must pray for what I've seen about the great shaking of the economy. I told you all BlackRock and these major evil men are going to try to embarrass Trump. They're going to try to embarrass America, as these are things the left, the far-left, hate. And I'm not always on the Trump train going, 'Oh yeah, Trump, Trump, Trump.' I'm on Jesus's train going, 'Jesus, Jesus, Jesus.' But I know God puts people in position for a reason, for His purpose. And we prayed this through. So, I've warned you all about a major shaking to awaken. And I've seen a major thing trying to take place over this week. And everybody is going to see it, but it's the week of the eclipse. One year has come by; six months from the election, there is a supernatural timeframe going into Passover. We're getting ready to go into Passover next week. And the next week starts at the beginning of Passover, I believe. So, we have this prophetic time clock that is all in front of our face that is about America. And I saw the main thing about what's going on with this tariff. I saw a drain, a massive drain, turning and sucking down further. I've warned you all about the debt of all the credit card debts. There's too much top-heavy credit card debt with people not paying their credit cards. I saw loans on cars and houses defaulting—major defaulting coming. He talked to me about the used car market, warning me about a certain CarMax. I drove by it and I heard, 'CarMax in trouble.' What does that mean? I don't know. I just keep driving. I told my brain, I said, 'What? I heard CarMax in trouble. What is that?' And I saw interest rates on car loans and things with the economy, and I saw people not going out to eat. I saw people eating around their tables. I saw a great shaking to awaken, bringing the morals back into the house where people are like, 'Hey, they can't afford to eat out.' And I know I've told you all that we're praying for a window for the wealth of the sinner laid up for the righteous. But you will have to hear Him like you're hearing a clock tick. If you are not dead still, you'll not hear it. But you must listen to the Father for what is coming. And most people go, 'Brandon, you said all this. You said that.' Yeah, I've said a lot. And every single thing has been led by the Spirit of God to pray. I told you my gift is not prophetic, y'all. My gift is a watchman telling you the storm. And I told you I saw a storm about the crash. I've seen these things. But I told you that the big elite men like Bezos and Bill Gates and these evil men—George Soros, these people—would try to embarrass by pulling the curtain out even further, making it sink faster and harder than what it should. And if we did not step in and pray, we would see a 1930s-style event earlier than what it should have. I saw a plague coming. I've seen all these things coming. I told you that when these things take place, we would see the dollar and the money in the banks be seized. Remember, I warned you about the seizing of the money in the banks. And when this happens, a new digital dollar on an American flag that was turned into a hundred-dollar bill... half of the hundred-dollar bill was worth fifty cents. And the Lord told me, 'I saw digital writing going upon this flag.' You can watch the video; it's in the link down below. I saw the American flag and I saw what was a hundred-dollar bill become worth half. And I saw a debt crisis, a debt jubilee—all the debt: housing, car notes, everything. Everybody was able to pay their mortgages and everything happened. And then there was a new digital dollar that would come about eventually. Are we at that place? I pray we're not because I saw food lines. I saw grocery stores. I saw grocery shelves empty. I saw trade wars. I warned you about trade wars. Listen to what they're saying in the media. I warned you of this in 2023. Trade wars were coming between China and America. And when this takes place, there were no medical supplies—no medicines, or certain medicines—because China was retaliating against trade wars. That's what I saw. And I only tell you what I see. It doesn't make sense in 2023. And I see Trump's face leading it. Why? He wasn't even president; they were still trying to throw him in prison at that time. But I see it, and I told everybody. I see trade wars between China and America, and this is what's coming and it's going to be very bad. It will escalate and escalate out of control. This is big. And then I saw gold and I saw these things, and I've warned you all. This is where I believe the American eclipse—one year this week. We'll see. Maybe there will be nothing; it'll be a nothing. But I believe that eclipse was for a reason, and we're going into this week. Does that mean we're going to have a major something happen this week? No. But I'm telling you all to be watchful. I'm telling you all to be prayed up. Pray for our president. There are rats within. Not everyone who hangs around him is what they seem. There's a lot of people who trust blindly because you are able to put on a good front and you have a good act. We trust a lot as the body of Christ. "Oh yeah, that guy's saved. He's radically saved. Boy, I'm telling you, he gave his heart over there," and they're behind the scenes doing bad things. We need to walk in some discernment in these last days. Be watchful. Trust no one. Be watchful and look around you. It's like Billy Brim said, you need to know the difference between the sharks and the dolphins. There's a lot of sharks out there, folks. And there's a lot of dolphins, but they both swim alike and they both look alike in the water from a distance. From a distance, but one has a lot bigger teeth. It's the truth. And the world and the body of Christ trust real easy. Remember I told you all to watch the celebrities that come in and say, "I've got Jesus Christ all of a sudden," and they start leading. They try to lead and they start telling everybody, "This is the way to go," because then they'll start... I saw celebrities that say they got radically born again and start YouTube channels and everything else and then all of a sudden start leading lots of people, and it was sent by the devil as a distraction and they don't even realize it. And they start saying there's a universal gospel, there's more ways to heaven than Jesus Christ—all religions are... you can make it to heaven anyway other than Jesus. Remember that. I warned everybody about this in 2023. So words that I'm getting in 2023 are coming to pass, starting to line up in 2025. Trade wars, economy, all this stuff. And I'm like, "Whoa, God." Look at the eclipse. You had Great Shake, and you said there was a big thing from Passover to Passover. I warned you all: major shifting and shaking will take place from Passover to Passover. And I thought, "Man, what's going on?" Look at all the shifting and shaking. So, just watch the eclipse. The eclipse came. Now, we have another cool sign on the 25th with the two stars and the moon. They'll look like two eyes and a moon in the sky on the 25th of April. I was kind of excited about that. I thought we were talking about Braden. We weren't. I said, "Well, you think that that's God smiling with the two planets in the sky?" I thought, "That's God smiling. He's up there looking down." I said, "What's he smiling about, though?" Let's just believe something good is going to happen because that's God smiling. I don't know. I try to be optimistic and be happy. I try to warn you all. I sound the alarm as loud as I can without coming across as a Debbie Downer, like, "Oh no, the sky is falling." It's like this one guy who goes, "Oh no, it's going to zero. Crypto's going to zero." You know, I'm like, "No, it's not. I'm not believing that. I'm believing for the turnaround. I'm believing for good things." But I'm telling you all, we're in a time like we've never seen before. And if we don't pull our heads out of the sand, we're going to miss it. And when we hear these things, and we know what the Lord has told us, there'll be great shakeouts. What does that mean to you? There'll be a great shakeout. People will freak out because they were bandwagons. I'm not telling you what to do with your money; I never have. Most people go, "Well, you're telling us what to do..." I haven't told you to do nothing. You do what you feel God's called you to do. I don't know nothing. I'm telling you, I'm not a financial adviser. I'm nothing. I'm just Braden, and I just pray and I think it's fun to watch what God is doing in these last days because I am staying vertical. I refuse to look horizontal and go "the sky is falling, Chicken Little," because I'm telling you, if you watch CNN enough or MSNBC, you're going to be chasing your tail. People are going to be freaking out if they're watching because of all the bad news that is on there right now trying to smear Trump, and they will sink this thing on purpose just to get back at him because they hate him that much. Yeah, it didn't help that he's trying to line up this, but they'll try to pull the plug. It's like, "Okay, we're waiting and now pull." Let's sink this sucker as fast as we can and we'll go, "See, we told you it was the Republicans. Don't vote for them in the midterms. Let's destroy this thing." And if that doesn't work, let's bring out the Kraken—and that's the virus. Watch. Watch and pray. So, let's take communion today. Let's believe God for the good things that He has for us and that we're listening to Him and we're smarter than they are. I don't have any economic background at all. But I have Jesus. He's the great economist. And not only does He know the future, He knows our future and He knows our past. And He knows our weaknesses. He knows it all, ladies and gentlemen. But He's not freaked out about any of it. He's the one that stands on the water. He's the one that parts the seas and causes peace to the storms. He's the one that goes, "Peace, be still." He didn't yell it and freak out. No. Jesus said, "Peace, be still." He didn't freak out. He wasn't going, "Oh, no. These waves are way too big. My angels are not going to be strong enough to help me with these." He wasn't freaking out. He just looked at the waves. He looked at the stuff and He said, "Peace, be still." Why? Because the storm wasn't inside of Him. He had control of the storm. Many let the storm inside of them and the storm of what they see going horizontal. Jesus was vertical. "I do nothing unless I see my Father tell me to do it. I say nothing unless I hear my Father say to do it." I only say what He says to say because He was the master of the sea. He was the master of the storm. Everything He did, He had control of the storm around Him, the people, everything. I'm not moved by the bullies. I'm not moved by the Pharisees. I'm not moved by Lazarus being dead. I'm not moved by the leper. I'm not moved. I am moved only because I'm filled with control by the Holy Ghost. Dead to self. And that's who our God was. He died, he rose again, and he is seated at the right hand of the Father. It is done, and what is awesome about it is he is within us. Thank you. I choose to believe he has the best for me. I choose to believe he has the best for Diana. He has the best for Braden. He has the best for us. And yet we see all these things around us and you say, 'I thought you said this. I thought you said that.' He did, but he never told you a time frame. That means just let it ride. Just let it ride. Father, when I looked at the prophetic word, everybody quotes Kim Clement a lot and I know he was a true man of God that heard the Lord. And he said the Dow at 20,000 when things look at their worst, then a sudden change down at 20,000. I thought, well, that's a long ways away from where it is right now. I thought, surely, was he talking about that? Could it go to 20,000? Kim Clement prophesied it, and I don't know, but I start searching inside of my spirit of things and I said, 'Holy Spirit, show me,' and he said, 'Dow at 20,000,' and he said, 'When things look at their worst, then a breakthrough will come.' I don't know. 20,000 from right now, that would be a very bad day. I don't even know what that would look like. I don't even know how that would happen. I mean, from 46,000 to 20,000, there's going to be a lot of people crying if that happens. Seriously, that would be a Great Depression, wouldn't it? I mean, I don't know anything about that kind of stuff. I just look at old prophetic words. I thought, 'Did he miss it?' I don't know. All of us could. All of us have. I'm not saying he gets everything right. I don't know. But I just think it's interesting because I pull words up and I go, 'What does this mean? What was it about?' I don't know. But the eclipse meant something. The Great American Eclipse meant something. And it was more than a presidency. Many people go, 'Well, we got our president, everything.' No, he was looking upon the heart. It was like Jonah. What was going on in Nineveh that the eclipse took place and the warning took place for them to change because he said judgment was coming? What was God speaking through the two eclipses going across the New Madrid fault? What was he saying? Was it, 'Well, if you vote Democrat, I'm going to bring that'? I don't think it had anything to do with Democrats and Republicans. I think what God's looking at is much deeper than that. He's looking at the heart of man. He's looking at the heart of the church. He's looking at the state of the church. Where are we as a body? And people go, 'Well, it has to do with red versus blue.' It's too shallow, folks. Too shallow. What is it that we always compare about the politicians in America? 'Well, it's about the Democrats versus the Republicans.' I mean, come on. That's so shallow. It's much deeper than that. It's bigger than that. My goodness, folks. We've got to let the elevator go to the top. It's much bigger than that. It's bigger than where we are in these last days. Most people say, 'Well, we didn't have an earthquake.' Not yet. I've told you I saw a major earthquake coming on New Madrid. I've told you these major things. What makes all these dominoes fall? I believe what Donald Trump is doing, honestly, is getting us ready for the beast system, and he doesn't even realize he's being used to do it. He says he's making America great again to go in with a digital platform to bring in the beast system. It's what happens. But he's using him to do it. And most people are going, 'We love Trump. We love Trump.' And they're so excited. And I'm like, 'Yeah, I like him, too. He's a great guy. I pray for him.' But I still believe he's being led to bring forth the end-time system regardless of our love for Trump. Me too. But I still believe Elon Musk and all the things that I've warned you about are all still in motion. I pray for President Trump; I intercede for him every day. But most people do not realize how close we are to what we had to do to get the domino to fall over, to get the mechanism to get us into it. And most people are going, 'Well, this is laying us down to 2028 and to 2030 and Jesus,' and you know, 'it's going to make America great again in the future for the next 50 years.' And Jeremiah 23, remember that. You need to be careful who you're listening to. Chickens versus eagles. I'm telling you all, we've got to come up higher. Let's just lift up this body. I ramble too much. Thank you, Lord, for your body. Thank you, Lord, that you were bruised for our iniquities and the chastisement of our peace was upon you and with your stripes we're healed. Thank you, Lord, that Easter's coming, that Passover is coming. And God, I thank you that you were the great Passover. That as we take this beautiful body and this beautiful blood that represents our Passover, that represents you did it all for us, that the death angel and every circumstance is passing over because Jesus paid the price. And as the children of Israel put the lamb's blood upon the door and the death angel was not able to touch them, how much more, Father, that you do it for us. And we take this body in the name of Jesus. And we thank you, Lord, that you were wounded for us. You did it all. And you are awesome for what you did. Now Lord, we thank you for the blood. And we apply the blood of Jesus over our doorpost, over our house, over our minds, over our wills, our emotions. And Jesus, we apply the blood over every area of our life.
